## Summary

Describe what this change adds or updates in the Personal OS wiki (logs, wiki pages, tickler, or inbox processing).

## Scope

- [ ] Only Markdown under `small-projects/personal-wiki-builder/` (or paths agreed in PR description)
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, API keys, or customer PII

## Templates & rules

- [ ] New structured pages follow `templates/` where applicable
- [ ] Inbox items from `raw/` include **Context extraction** when URLs or long notes are moved
